Existing BMF grammar body, string helper, Main call, StartResultStack, Rule.operator== final return, and BML file forward/backward proofs remain green. The native-boundary audit still reports no BML/BMF semantic natives and requires only generic source_scan_file.

phase_gate.reason: This closes the focused BMF.Compile happy/no-syntax/failed-invoke compiler-driver path. Full BML thesis parity remains open: exception object matching, console/line-count formatting, whole BMF grammar rule execution, complete statement/expression lowering, and companion-corpus compile/run proof still need further implementation.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk adds BodySource detection and execution for ParseStream assignment, syntax lookup through m_hSyntaxes.Get(GetFileExtension(...)), hSyntax null false path, and hSyntax.Invoke(self, hStream, 0).

form/form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-bmf-compile-source-proof.fk parses the original BMF-grammar.bml Compile method and proves happy path, no-syntax false path without Invoke, failed-invoke false path, and native method_invoke dispatch.
docs/system_audit/bml_thesis_feature_audit_20260601.md records the newly proven compiler-driver slice while keeping full parity gaps explicit.
